expectations.text: Uses exchange_calendars regular_holidays API (not a manual list or holidays pip package)
expectations.evidence: Line 49: xcals.get_calendar(exchange). Lines 73-79: Uses sessions_in_range + bdate_range difference (effectively same as regular_holidays). Also uses holidays pip lib as complement (line 118), but primary signal is exchange_calendars.

expectations.text: References correct MIC codes: XNYS for NYSE and XLON for LSE
Shows the major_holiday = both NYSE AND LSE closed pattern
Holiday detection excludes weekends (only counts official exchange closures)
expectations.evidence: Line 78: Uses bdate_range (business days only). Line 79: .difference(sessions) gives only weekday non-trading days.
